user1.name: Rajesh Kumar
user1.text: This platform saved me hours of work. The PDF merging tool is incredibly fast and reliable.

user2.name: Priya Sharma
user2.text: As a student, I use WeLovePDF daily for converting lecture notes. It's a lifesaver!

user3.name: Amit Patel
user3.text: The API integration and batch processing capabilities are excellent for our business needs.

q1.question: Is WeLovePDF free to use?
q1.answer: Yes! All basic PDF tools are completely free. We offer premium features for advanced needs.

q2.question: Are my files secure?
q2.answer: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption and automatically delete files after 1 hour.

q3.question: What file sizes are supported?
q3.answer: We support files up to 100MB for free users and up to 2GB for premium users.

q4.question: Do I need to install any software?
q4.answer: No installation required. WeLovePDF works entirely in your browser.

q5.question: Can I use it on mobile?
q5.answer: Yes! Our website is fully responsive and works perfectly on all mobile devices.
